# مفتاح اللغة | KeyLang

Arabic-first platform for learning English and German using AI tutoring, spaced repetition (SRS), custom flashcards, pronunciation support, and interactive stories.

## Platform Facts

- **Name**: مفتاح اللغة (KeyLang)
- **Primary Function**: English and German learning for Arabic-speaking learners through guided lessons, custom flashcards, AI feedback, and contextual practice.
- **Supported Learning Languages**: English and German.
- **Core Technology**: 
  - AI Tutor: grammar correction, examples, explanation, and conversation practice.
  - SRS: spaced repetition scheduling for long-term memory.
  - Smart Flashcards: user-created cards organized in folders.
  - Interactive Stories: context-based reading, listening, and comprehension.
  - Admin Content System: managed lessons, stories, cards, settings, and marketing content.
- **Pricing**: Highly affordable, approx. 2 EGP/day (~$0.04 USD).
- **Target Market**: Primarily Arabic-speaking learners.

## Useful Links

- [Homepage](https://keylang.app/)
- [Login/Start](https://keylang.app/login)
- [Pricing](https://keylang.app/#pricing)
- [Features](https://keylang.app/#features)

## FAQ Summary

- **What is the platform?** A web app for learning English and German through smart cards, lessons, stories, pronunciation, and AI feedback.
- **Is there a free trial?** Yes, full 24-hour access with no credit card required.
- **How does AI help?** It corrects sentences, explains grammar, gives examples, and supports conversation practice.
- **What is SRS?** A smart review system that schedules cards around memory and performance.
